definition.name: Stage1-2DFFT
definition.definition: Stage 1 of the fast algorithm: for each k=0,...,N-1, compute the 2-D DFT F2[k,n,m] = sum_{j1,j2} f(phi_{j1}, theta_k, psi_{j2}) e^{i n phi_{j1}} e^{i m psi_{j2}}. After Stage 1 the DFT reduces to inner products <s, P^l_{nm}> with [s]_k = F2[k,n,m] sin(theta_k) (paper line 1347).
